commands.command: cd scripts && vp create --no-interactive vite:application # from non-monorepo subdir

commands: test -f scripts/vite-plus-application/package.json && echo 'Created at scripts/vite-plus-application' || echo 'NOT at scripts/'
test ! -f vite-plus-application/package.json && echo 'Not at parent root' || echo 'BUG: created at parent root'
